summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aurora Therapiezentrum room rental booking system. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working correctly, admin functionality operational, user registration and approval flow working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Some time slots appear disabled/grayed out when they should be available

passed_tests: Room rental page shows correct prices (25€/h + 5€ flipchart)
Opening hours correctly displayed (Mo-Do 8-19, Fr 8-16, Sa 9-16, So closed)
Calendar shows available days with Sundays grayed out
Login functionality working for both users and admin
Admin login with admin@aurora-therapiezentrum.de / Aurora2024! working
Admin can view pending users and approve them
Admin dashboard shows stats and bookings
Price calculation (hours × 25€ + optional flipchart) is correct
